1.name: [1] Pierce the Murk
1.description: The caster permanently gains the ability to see through darkness The Shadow of Hands That Serve : Summon a small abyssal shadow to serve as a spy or servant Weight of Shadows : Control naturally occurring shadows Light within Shadow : Allows a vampire to see through darkness at will Pierce the Veil : The caster permanently gains the ability to see through darkness Eyes of the Abyss : Summon tiny denizens of the Abyss

1.description: Summon tiny denizens of the Abyss
references: Vampire: the Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 271

2.name: [2] The Heart That Beats in Silence
2.description: Summon a more powerful abyssal shadow that can attack foes Transubstantiation of Essence : Channel the Abyss to heal your wounds more efficiently Feed the Darkness : Feed through the touch of an Arm of the Abyss Comforting Darkness : Use the Abyss to heal your wounds Subsume the Darkness : Consume the Abyss to heal wounds

2.name: Comforting Darkness
2.description: Use the Abyss to heal your wounds
references: Lore of the Clans Pg. 126

2.description: Feed through the touch of an Arm of the Abyss
references: Rites of the Blood Pg. 38

2.name: Subsume the Darkness
2.description: Consume the Abyss to heal wounds
references: Vampire: the Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 272

3.name: [3] Drinking the Blood of Ahriman
3.description: Raise Physical Attributes to your Obtenebration rating and use Obtenebration powers more easily Calling the Hungry Shade : Summon a powerful abyssal creature called a Hungry Shade and attempt to bind it to your service Abyssal Threads : Attach a thread to a person or object to the wrist of the caster The Third Eye of Rickard Argentis : Summons forth a mysterious third eye, forged from abyssal energies, which rests upon the caster's forehead and protects him from harm. Claiming the Dark : Fuse your body with the Abyss, strengthening the vampire and making it easier for him to use Obtenebration at the cost of becoming incredibly weak against sunlight Balthazar's Revelation : Infuse a coin with Abyssal energies that force a derangement upon anyone else holding it

3.name: Abyssal Threads
3.description: Attach a thread to a person or object to the wrist of the caster
references: Rites of the Blood Pg. 38

3.name: Balthazar's Revelation
3.description: Infuse a coin with Abyssal energies that force a derangement upon anyone else holding it
references: Vampire: the Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 272

3.name: Calling the Hungry Shade
3.description: Summon a powerful abyssal creature called a Hungry Shade and attempt to bind it to your service
